name: session-refactor-batch-1-owner-construction
title: Session refactor batch 1 owner construction
description: 统一 session owner 解析并引入最小 SessionConstructionPlan 事实源，让 context query 与 launch construction 收敛到同一上游。
creator: codex-agent
notes: Batch 1 已完成 owner resolver 与最小 construction fact/projection：context query 与 HTTP launch augment 共用 Task -> Story -> Project owner priority，context endpoint 通过 SessionConstructionPlan projection 输出。project/story/task 现有 context builder 暂留迁移 adapter，后续单独下沉。
